name: com.pulsemcp/onepassword
description: MCP server for interacting with 1Password via the CLI to read and manage credentials.

environmentVariables.name: OP_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Service account token for authentication with 1Password CLI.

environmentVariables.name: ENABLED_TOOLGROUPS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated tool groups to enable (readonly, write).

environmentVariables.name: SKIP_HEALTH_CHECKS
environmentVariables.description: Skip credential validation on server startup.

environmentVariables.name: DANGEROUSLY_SKIP_ELICITATIONS
environmentVariables.description: Bypass all credential approval prompts (exposes all secrets).

environmentVariables.name: OP_ELICITATION_READ
environmentVariables.description: Prompt for approval before revealing credentials.

environmentVariables.name: OP_ELICITATION_WRITE
environmentVariables.description: Prompt for approval before creating or sharing items.

environmentVariables.name: OP_WHITELISTED_ITEMS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated item titles or IDs that bypass read elicitation.
